# Typx SSG Starter

> A minimal Typst-powered static site generator starter template.

## Important Links

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/amooo-ooo/typx-ssg-starter): Source code repository
- [Home](/index.typ): Landing page
- [Cheatsheet](/cheatsheet.typ): Typst syntax cheatsheet
- [Blog](/blog/building-typst-ssg.typ): Blog post on building the SSG
